## PartialQueryButton class

A button that when pressed emits the [XEventsTypes.UserAcceptedAQuery](./x-components.xeventstypes.useracceptedaquery.md) and [SearchXEvents.UserClickedPartialQuery](./x-components.searchxevents.userclickedpartialquery.md) events, expressing the user intention to set the partial query.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class PartialQueryButton extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [query](./x-components.partialquerybutton.query.md) |  | string | The query property. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [emitEvents()](./x-components.partialquerybutton.emitevents.md) |  | Emits events when the button is clicked. |
